title: Gyunyeo's Eleven Devotional Poems
description: The earliest surviving Korean Buddhist poetry — eleven devotional hymns to the bodhisattvas.
introduction: The earliest surviving Korean Buddhist poetry — eleven devotional hymns to the bodhisattvas.

translation.text: To the Bodhisattva of Compassion I bow. With a thousand arms you reach out to all beings. With a thousand eyes you see all suffering. Let your mercy fall on this land like rain.
